nasb.text: And He built His sanctuary like the heights, Like the earth which He has founded forever.

esv.text: He built his sanctuary like the high heavens, like the earth, which he has founded forever.

cnv.text: 他建造了自己的聖所好像在高天之上， 又像他所建立永存的大地。

ccb.text: 祂为自己建造高耸的圣所， 使它像大地一样长存。

csbs.text: 他建造他的圣所如同高峰， 又像他永远建立的大地。
